name: Stellaron Hunters || Honkai Star Rail
description:
Explore planets with the Stellaron Hunters and plant Stellarons, causing chaos and being the exciting villain…

—————————

Hey! I wanted to make this one after the main Astral Express RPG. I really like the Stellaron Hunters because they’re so cool—and all the fanart is epic.

—————————

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️

Violence, potential boss battles, people in power lying, dom mommies, being the villain

—————————
